messages.content: List exactly 5 Bible verses about comfort in hard times. Reply with exactly 5 lines and nothing else. Each line must look like this: Reference | the exact verse text, word for word, in the King James Version

message.content:
Isaiah 41:10 | Fear thou not; for I am with thee: be not dismayed: for I am thy God: I will strengthen thee; yea, I will help thee; yea, I will uphold thee with the right hand of my righteousness.
2 Corinthians 13:5 | Examine yourselves whether ye be in the faith; prove your own souls. Or as concerning that comfort when we shall meet again... wait for me to finish it correctly first then provide exactly five lines.
